rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
Place input/output contracts in component types only when using visible features and avoiding subcomponent paths.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries by matching AGREE annex placement to feature visibility and data context.
Only reference ports or data elements that are explicitly visible in the target scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use int, real, and bool as scalar types in AGREE declarations.
Boolean comparisons must align with port data type; do not coerce Boolean to numeric.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
Avoid generating numeric range logic for Boolean-typed ports without explicit numeric representation.
